Video.summary: Start your journey through forensic history with the Jack the Ripper murders.
Video.grandparentTitle: Forensic History: Crimes, Frauds, and Scandals
Video.title: The Infamous Jack the Ripper

Video.summary: Study the special forensic category known as lust murder with the 1947 murder-mutilation of the Black Dahlia.
Video.grandparentTitle: Forensic History: Crimes, Frauds, and Scandals
Video.title: Analyzing the Black Dahlia Murder

Video.summary: Go to Hollywood and look at how crime scene investigation and autopsy results solve mysteries.
Video.grandparentTitle: Forensic History: Crimes, Frauds, and Scandals
Video.title: Dissecting Hollywood Deaths

Video.summary: How can cutting-edge research and technology be applied to old cases and result in fresh conclusions?
Video.grandparentTitle: Forensic History: Crimes, Frauds, and Scandals
Video.title: Decomposition and Confusing Interpretations

Video.summary: Examine three key periods of U.S. intelligence before the birth of the CIA.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Agency: A History of the CIA
Video.title: Secrecy, Democracy, and the Birth of the CIA

Image.alt: Secrecy, Democracy, and the Birth of the CIA
Secrecy, Democracy, and the Birth of the CIA
Secrecy, Democracy, and the Birth of the CIA

Video.summary: Learn how the CIA transformed from an intelligence agency to housing a premier covert-action unit.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Agency: A History of the CIA
Video.title: George Kennan and the Rise of Covert Ops

Image.alt: George Kennan and the Rise of Covert Ops
George Kennan and the Rise of Covert Ops
George Kennan and the Rise of Covert Ops

Video.summary: Discover how the CIA failed to rein in the growing emphasis on covert operations.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Agency: A History of the CIA
Video.title: The CIA, China, and the Korean War

Image.alt: The CIA, China, and the Korean War
The CIA, China, and the Korean War
The CIA, China, and the Korean War

Video.summary: Ponder who was most responsible for Mohammad Mosaddeq's fall from power.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Agency: A History of the CIA
Video.title: The Iran Coup of August 1953

Video.summary: Explore the CIA's role in the Guatemalan coup (the operation PB-SUCCESS).
Video.grandparentTitle: The Agency: A History of the CIA
Video.title: Regime Change in Guatemala

Video.summary: Investigate CIA efforts to organize anti-communists in Eastern Europe.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Agency: A History of the CIA
Video.title: Operation Rollback in Eastern Europe

Video.summary: Learn how the CIA employed human agents as spies and use advanced technology to gather intelligence.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Agency: A History of the CIA
Video.title: U-2 Spy Missions and Battleground Berlin

Image.alt: U-2 Spy Missions and Battleground Berlin
U-2 Spy Missions and Battleground Berlin
U-2 Spy Missions and Battleground Berlin

Video.summary: In this episode, go inside the CIA's three major covert ops setbacks of the late 1950s.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Agency: A History of the CIA
Video.title: The CIA in Syria, Indonesia, and the Congo

Image.alt: The CIA in Syria, Indonesia, and the Congo
The CIA in Syria, Indonesia, and the Congo
The CIA in Syria, Indonesia, and the Congo

Video.summary: Learn what the Dead Sea Scrolls are, the story of their unlikely discovery.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Dead Sea Scrolls
Video.title: The Discoveries and Their Significance

Video.summary: Discover more about how scholars gained access to the first seven scrolls discovered at Qumran.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Dead Sea Scrolls
Video.title: The First Seven Scrolls

Video.summary: Explore the scroll known as the Community Rule or Manual of Discipline.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Dead Sea Scrolls
Video.title: Opening and Reading the First Scroll

Image.alt: Opening and Reading the First Scroll
Opening and Reading the First Scroll
Opening and Reading the First Scroll

Video.summary: Consider history prior to the scrolls, beginning with the biblical period and moving forward.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Dead Sea Scrolls
Video.title: The Historical Backdrop of Ancient Judaism

Image.alt: The Historical Backdrop of Ancient Judaism
The Historical Backdrop of Ancient Judaism
The Historical Backdrop of Ancient Judaism

Video.summary: Gain insight into the appearance of Jewish sectarianism in late antiquity.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Dead Sea Scrolls
Video.title: The Rise of the Jewish Sects

Image.alt: The Rise of the Jewish Sects
The Rise of the Jewish Sects
The Rise of the Jewish Sects

Video.summary: Learn how archaeological excavations helped scholars form the hypothesis of who wrote the scrolls.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Dead Sea Scrolls
Video.title: The Dead Sea Site of the Qumran Sect

Image.alt: The Dead Sea Site of the Qumran Sect
The Dead Sea Site of the Qumran Sect
The Dead Sea Site of the Qumran Sect

Video.summary: Examine some later rabbinic texts from the 3rd century and the rise of the rabbinical tradition itself.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Dead Sea Scrolls
Video.title: The Emergence of the Rabbinic System

Image.alt: The Emergence of the Rabbinic System
The Emergence of the Rabbinic System
The Emergence of the Rabbinic System

Video.summary: Explore the history behind the famous Damascus Document.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Dead Sea Scrolls
Video.title: A Dead Sea Scroll from Medieval Cairo

Image.alt: A Dead Sea Scroll from Medieval Cairo
A Dead Sea Scroll from Medieval Cairo
A Dead Sea Scroll from Medieval Cairo

Video.summary: Uncover covert and intelligence operations employed during WWII by different countries.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Secret World of Espionage
Video.title: Strange Bedfellows

Video.summary: Secret codes may be one of the most interesting and intriguing components of espionage.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Secret World of Espionage
Video.title: Making Codes, Breaking Codes

Video.summary: Investigate the stories of specific characters in espionage history, such as The Cambridge Five.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Secret World of Espionage
Video.title: The Mole and the Hunter

Video.summary: Take a look at an operation so secret, even Prime Minister Winston Churchill didn't know about it.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Secret World of Espionage
Video.title: The Art of Counterintelligence
